title: taraxacum subjurassicum
intro: Taraxacum subjurassicum, also known as the Jurassic dandelion, is a rare and unique species of plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is characterized by its distinctive leaf structure and yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum subjurassicum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. This plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum subjurassicum may include infusions, tinctures, and dried extracts, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other remedies for various health purposes.
